Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

There are several ways to support us:
Rate the app in the store
What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
I need help or I would like to make a suggestion. How can I contact you?
You can join our Discord Server to ask for help or to provide feedback, or you can email us at devs@clashk.ing. Please only write in English or French.
For some reasons we can't open your mail client. We copied the email address for you. You can write an email and paste the address in the recipient field.

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions

Translations are done by app users like you! We (developers) only provide French and English translations. If you find missing or incorrect translations, you can help improve them. Do not hesitate to reach out to us on Discord or via email if want to help us. We have a specific Discord channel for translators where you can ask questions and get help.
A huge thank you to all our amazing translators who help us make this app accessible to more people around the world!
You can help us translate the app on Crowdin. If your language is not available on Crowdin, feel free to request it in our Discord Server. Thank you so much for your help!

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!
The task completion percentage is calculated based on the following activities with specific weightings:
Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance

Clan War League performance and member contributions

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!

Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.

Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!
The task completion percentage is calculated based on the following activities with specific weightings:
Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!

Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
Why is my data not syncing?
Player or clan data appears outdated
Pull down to refresh the page
Check if your clan is tracked (see above)
Wait a few minutes and try again : the API can take some time to update
Close the app and restart it
Update the app to the latest version
Clear app cache and data (Android) or reinstall the app
Contact support if problem persists (see last section)
Why can't I verify my account?
Problems linking your Clash of Clans account
Make sure you're using the correct player tag starting with #
If the account seems to be already linked, use the API token from Clash of Clans settings

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions

Translations are done by app users like you! We (developers) only provide French and English translations. If you find missing or incorrect translations, you can help improve them. Do not hesitate to reach out to us on Discord or via email if want to help us. We have a specific Discord channel for translators where you can ask questions and get help.

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
I need help or I would like to make a suggestion. How can I contact you?
You can join our Discord Server to ask for help or to provide feedback, or you can email us at devs@clashk.ing. Please only write in English or French.
For some reasons we can't open your mail client. We copied the email address for you. You can write an email and paste the address in the recipient field.

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!

Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.
How can I support your work?
There are several ways to support us:
Rate the app in the store
What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
I need help or I would like to make a suggestion. How can I contact you?
You can join our Discord Server to ask for help or to provide feedback, or you can email us at devs@clashk.ing. Please only write in English or French.
For some reasons we can't open your mail client. We copied the email address for you. You can write an email and paste the address in the recipient field.

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!
The task completion percentage is calculated based on the following activities with specific weightings:
Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!

Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions

Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!
The task completion percentage is calculated based on the following activities with specific weightings:
Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
I need help or I would like to make a suggestion. How can I contact you?
You can join our Discord Server to ask for help or to provide feedback, or you can email us at devs@clashk.ing. Please only write in English or French.
For some reasons we can't open your mail client. We copied the email address for you. You can write an email and paste the address in the recipient field.

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions

Translations are done by app users like you! We (developers) only provide French and English translations. If you find missing or incorrect translations, you can help improve them. Do not hesitate to reach out to us on Discord or via email if want to help us. We have a specific Discord channel for translators where you can ask questions and get help.
A huge thank you to all our amazing translators who help us make this app accessible to more people around the world!
You can help us translate the app on Crowdin. If your language is not available on Crowdin, feel free to request it in our Discord Server. Thank you so much for your help!

Due to limitations of the Clash of Clans API, our data might not always be perfectly accurate. Here's why:
The API can take up to 5 minutes to update, causing a lag in reflecting real-time trophy changes.
If multiple attacks or defenses happen in quick succession, the API might show combined results (e.g., +68 or -68).
If an attack and defense occur at the same time, you might see a mixed result (e.g., +4).
Despite timing issues, the overall net gain or loss for the day is accurate.

These limitations are common across all tools using the Clash of Clans API. We sadly can't fix that as it is in Supercell's hands. We do our best to compensate for these limits and provide results as close to reality as possible. Thank you for understanding!
The task completion percentage is calculated based on the following activities with specific weightings:
Weight of 8 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 5 points per account (or 6 if the last attack has been unlocked), 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 2 points per account, 1 attack = 1 point.
Weight of 1 point per account, 1 attack = 1 point. CWL cannot be tracked if the player is not in their league clan.

Weight of 2 points each per account. The ratio is based on the number of days remaining (1 month for the pass and 6 days for the games). Green = on track to complete the pass or games, red = behind schedule.

Why is the data sometimes inaccurate or missing?

ClashKing can only retrieve this info if the clan is tracked. If your clan isn't tracked, please invite the ClashKing Bot to your Discord Server and use the command /addclan. We are working on making this feature available in the app soon.
The tracking can stop working for a certain period of time. This is why you can sometimes have holes in your data. We are working on improving this.

Some data is provided by Clash of Clans and their API have some limitations. This is the case for legends tracking, it sometimes stacks the trophy gain and loss as if it was a single attack. This is also why we don't have any information on your building levels.

What can the ClashKing Discord bot do?

The ClashKing Discord bot helps you manage your clan directly from Discord with comprehensive tracking tools, automated notifications, and seamless integration with this app. It's designed for clan leaders and members who want to stay connected and organized:
Add and monitor multiple clans and players with real-time updates
Track war performance, analyze attacks, and get war notifications
Get alerts for donations, war attacks, and important clan events
Use slash commands to quickly access player stats, war info, and more
I need help or I would like to make a suggestion. How can I contact you?
You can join our Discord Server to ask for help or to provide feedback, or you can email us at devs@clashk.ing. Please only write in English or French.
For some reasons we can't open your mail client. We copied the email address for you. You can write an email and paste the address in the recipient field.

ClashKing is an open-source Clash of Clans statistics and clan management project created by passionate players for the community. We develop this as a side project alongside our full-time jobs, driven by our love for the game. We offer a mobile app, Discord bot, and free API that work together to provide the ultimate Clash of Clans experience. The project is funded entirely through user donations and Supercell Creator code usage - no ads, no premium features!

Take your Clash of Clans experience to the next level! ClashKing app delivers beautiful, fast access to all your stats and clan data - perfect for players who do not have Discordand those who prefer a sleek mobile experience:
We're actively developing new features to make the app even better. Your feedback helps us improve!
Track your progress, achievements, and legend league performance
Monitor clan members, donations, and overall clan health
Analyze war performance, attack strategies, and win rates
Daily trophy tracking and end-of-season statistics
Clan War League performance and member contributions
